'''Gravan Seven''' was a [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Its volcanoes polluted the skies, making them hard to navigate. [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s forces [[Ambush at Gravan Seven|ambushed]] [[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon Squadron]] there, killing all in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[training squadron]], except for the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Myn Donos]], and his [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Shiner]].

{{Planet-stub}}
